name: Bahrain
sources: https://evisa.gov.bh/list-of-online-visa-country.html (re-verified live 2026-06-13 via Firecrawl stealth - 211 countries confirmed)
https://www.evisa.gov.bh/list-of-onarrival-visa-country.html (re-verified live 2026-06-13 via Firecrawl stealth - 204 countries confirmed, all with conditions apply)
https://evisa.gov.bh/VisaBhr7En.html (FAQ page - re-verified live 2026-06-13; confirms VoA conditions are border officer discretion on nationality basis, not credential requirement)

name: Cameroon
sources: https://www.evisacam.cm/ - Official MINREX e-visa portal (Cameroon) - re-checked; only shows login/registration, no public visa info
http://cameroonemb-jp.org/visa/info-visa-application/ - Official Cameroon Embassy in Japan - confirmed bilateral exemption list

https://ambacamcaire.com/consular-services/general-info/exemption-to-the-requirement-of-an-entry-visa/ - Official Embassy of Cameroon in Egypt - confirmed Nigeria, Republic of Congo, CAR, Chad visa-free

name: Gabon
sources: https://evisa.dgdi.ga/ - official DGDI e-visa portal (primary source)
https://evisa.dgdi.ga/#/exemptions - official bilateral visa exemptions list (SSL certificate error prevented direct scraping; data from previous research session)

name: Guinea-Bissau
sources: http://www.gov.gw/ (DNS does not resolve - inaccessible, confirmed again during re-validation)

https://www.travel.state.gov/content/travel/en/international-travel/International-Travel-Country-Information-Pages/Guinea-Bissau.html (US State Dept country info page - confirms visa required, available on arrival)

https://travel.state.gov/content/travel/en/us-visas/Visa-Reciprocity-and-Civil-Documents-by-Country/Guinea-Bissau.html (US State Dept visa reciprocity page - confirmed this page covers US visa reciprocity schedules only, NOT Guinea-Bissau entry requirements; prior record source corrected)

name: Lithuania
sources: https://www.urm.lt/en/foreign-policy/treaties/bilateral/1221 (SUCCESS via Firecrawl - bilateral treaty index confirmed, updated 2025-02-04, Thailand new entry at /thailand/2220 identified)

https://www.urm.lt/en/treaties/bilateral/thailand/2220 (SUCCESS via Firecrawl - diplomatic and official/service passport waiver signed 18/06/2024, in force 07/04/2025, confirmed new entry)

name: Pakistan

name: Tunisia
